solutions.title: Tutorial
solutions.content:
1571A - Sequence of Comparisons
If $$$s$$$ consists only of characters
=
, then $$$a_1 = a_n$$$.
If $$$s$$$ consists only of characters
<
and
=
, then $$$a_1  \lt  a_n$$$.
If $$$s$$$ consists only of characters
>
and
=
, then $$$a_1  \gt  a_n$$$.
Otherwise, it is impossible to uniquely determine the relationship between $$$a_1$$$ and $$$a_n$$$. For example, this can be checked on the strings
<>
and
><
.

solutions.title: Solution (Neon)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
=
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val s
=
readLine
()!!
val l
=
s
.
count
({
it
==
'<'
})
val g
=
s
.
count
({
it
==
'>'
})
if
(
l
>
0
&&
g
>
0
)
println
(
"?"
)
else
if
(
l
>
0
)
println
(
"<"
);
else
if
(
g
>
0
)
println
(
">"
);
else
println
(
"="
);
}
